  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct

Uses of Package
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct

Packages that use com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.discrete
 
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct
    Class
    Description
    DisjunctEvaluationConfig
    Evaluation policy for objective computation during optimization.
    DisjunctEvaluationMode
    Objective evaluation mode for DM/RM/ADM fitness computation.
    DisjunctMatrix
    Immutable binary matrix view optimized for column-support operations used by disjunct/resolvable/almost-disjunct definitions.
    DisjunctMatrixValidationMode
    Validation execution strategy.
    DisjunctMatrixValidationOptions
    Controls when validation uses exhaustive enumeration versus statistically justified sampling, and configures the associated confidence bound.
    DisjunctMatrixValidationResult
    Structured validation outcome for DM/RM/ADM definitions.
    DisjunctProblemParams
    Shared typed parameter parsing for DM/RM/ADM problem plugins.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.discrete
    Class
    Description
    AlmostDisjunctMatrixProblem
    (t,epsilon)-disjunct matrix design objective using exact paper fitness: fit3(A) = fit1(A)/(C(N,t)*(N-t)).
    DisjunctMatrixProblem
    t-disjunct matrix design objective using exact paper fitness: fit1(A) = sum_{S in S_t} delta(S).
    ResolvableMatrixProblem
    (t,f)-resolvable matrix design objective using exact paper fitness: fit2(A) = |{S in S_t : delta(S) > f}|.
